title: Briful 15" Artificial Plants Calathea Zebrina Fake Plants Zebra Plant 38CM Decorative Artificial Indoor Plants Faux Maranta Plant in Pot for Home Office Bathroom Decorations
features: 【Tropical Life-Like House Plant】Bring the tropical warmth into your room with this artificial maranta plant. Dark green long leaves overlap one another and extend outward in various directions—giving this desk plant a fuller, lush look.
【Maranta Faux Plant】Decorative artificial plant comes in a black pot which serves to complement the vibrant leaves, making the rich green colour stand out even more.
【Eye-catching Maranta Plant】Thanks to the weight in the pot, the fake plant stands extremely reliably. However, the green plant looks very beautiful as an faux potted plant in one of your planters.

【Item Dimensions】Plant Height:15"/38cm, Pot Size: 4.7"x4.3"(12cm x 11cm). It will look amazing on a window sill, reception ledge, office desk or in the corner of any room to give the place a natural touch.
【Home Decoration】Real-looking maranta plants are very popular to decorate homes, parties and offices. They are also fit for housewarming gifts.
